headline: 200,000 real UI patterns, indexed
body: Mobbin curates over 200,000 real UI patterns from the world's best apps. Every screen, every flow, every interaction. Categorized, searchable, and timestamped. This is not a template library. It's a living archive of what actually works in production.
image_keyword: UI pattern gallery app design reference

headline: 23 patterns in 80% of top apps
body: The top 1% of apps share 23 common UI patterns that appear across 80% of successful onboarding flows. Mobbin makes these patterns visible. You stop guessing what good looks like and start studying what's already proven.

headline: 3 hours of browsing saves 12 hours of rework
body: Spending 3 hours browsing Mobbin before a design sprint saves roughly 12 hours of revision work. Teams that reference real patterns ship fewer throwaway screens and get to high-fidelity faster.

headline: AI outputs grounded in real usability
body: AI design tools are only as good as the references they learn from. Feeding Mobbin patterns into your AI prompt workflow gives you outputs grounded in real-world usability instead of generic templates.

headline: Informed design, not copying
body: The old way: open a blank canvas and hope inspiration strikes. The new way: search 200,000 proven patterns, pick the 3 that fit your use case, adapt them to your brand, and ship. That's not copying. That's informed design.

headline: Follow me for 30 days of tools that change how you build.
